provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, clean sterile alien civilization with smooth white walls and glowing blue accents, Star Trek utopia aesthetic, no wear or damage, everything looks manufactured yesterday, clinical and perfect

judgment.explanation: Clean sterile alien civilization — Star Trek utopia aesthetic. Violates every grit principle.
